creator: rguyom@321.net
text:
The FILES section of some postfix man pages contain literrally
        "!!PREFIX!!" instead of the real value (ie /usr/local most of the
        time).

Fix: In the "configure" script, sed and soelim aren't piped in the right order.
"!!PREFIX!!" isn't replaced by the real value because there is just ".so
man1/sendmail.1" in mailq.1 and newaliases.1 before "soelim".



for f in ${MAN1} ; do
        mv man1/$f man1/$f.bak && \
-               sed s+!!PREFIX!!+$PREFIX+g <man1/$f.bak | soelim >man1/$f
+               soelim < man1/$f.bak | sed s+!!PREFIX!!+$PREFIX+g > man1/$f
 done

 for f in ${MAN5} ; do
        mv man5/$f man5/$f.bak && \
-               sed s+!!PREFIX!!+$PREFIX+g <man5/$f.bak | soelim >man5/$f
+               soelim < man5/$f.bak | sed s+!!PREFIX!!+$PREFIX+g > man5/$f
 done

 for f in ${MAN8} ; do
        mv man8/$f man8/$f.bak && \
-               sed s+!!PREFIX!!+$PREFIX+g <man8/$f.bak | soelim >man8/$f
+               soelim < man8/$f.bak | sed s+!!PREFIX!!+$PREFIX+g > man8/$f
 done--MuEwyLFZ2XZNLGW1soO9tY10bqbhwbd9ihwFEPIJTzWOhUGc
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- /usr/ports/mail/postfix/scripts/configure   Mon Aug 30 14:06:27 1999
+++ scripts/configure   Sat Jun 10 22:02:48 2000
@@ -12,15 +12,15 @@
How-To-Repeat: 
	Build and install the port.
	Do "man newaliases" and look and the FILES section.
